tier_1.title: City Gate Queue
tier_1.description: A long line of merchants and travelers chokes the gate. Guards inspect every cart.
tier_1.success: You know a service entrance. Slip through without the wait.
tier_1.failure: Hours in line. The bureaucracy is merciless.

tier_1.title: Street Pickpocket
tier_1.description: A child bumps into you in the crowd. Quick hands dart toward your belt pouch.
tier_1.success: You catch the hand and the child flees empty-handed.
tier_1.failure: Your coin pouch is lighter. You notice too late.

tier_1.title: Market Surplus
tier_1.description: A merchant is closing up shop, selling the day's unsold stock at a discount.
tier_1.success: Trail rations at half price. Good deal.
tier_1.failure: Sold out before you reach the stall.

tier_2.title: Guild Blockade
tier_2.description: A trade guild has barricaded the district. No one passes without paying tribute.
tier_2.success: You know a route through the sewers. Unpleasant but effective.
tier_2.failure: Pay the toll or waste a day finding another route.

tier_2.title: City Watch Suspicion
tier_2.description: A patrol of guards stops your party. 'You match a description. Come with us.'
tier_2.success: You produce travel papers and they wave you through.
tier_2.failure: Hours of questioning at the watch house. You're released but delayed.
